summary: TTS | Details Tab from the scrubber bar
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is in the video player

steps.action:
WHEN the user displays the scrubber bar
AND navigates to the "Details" tab
steps.result: THEN the user should hear "In the options Menu. Details, <x> of <y> Options, Press up for player controls, Press down to navigate innings, press <appropriate_directions> for more options, Press back to dismiss controls."
